quote: Love one another. As I have loved you, so you must love one another.
author: Jesus

quote: I am the light of the world. Whoever follows me will never walk in darkness, but will have the light of life.
author: Jesus

quote: Do not let your hearts be troubled. You believe in God; believe also in me.
author: Jesus

quote: Blessed are the peacemakers, for they will be called children of God.
author: Jesus

quote: Ask and it will be given to you; search, and you will find; knock and the door will be opened for you.
author: Jesus

quote: If you judge people, you have no time to love them.
author: Mother Teresa

quote: Spread love everywhere you go. Let no one ever come to you without leaving happier.
author: Mother Teresa

quote: Not all of us can do great things. But we can do small things with great love.
author: Mother Teresa

quote: Kind words can be short and easy to speak, but their echoes are truly endless.
author: Mother Teresa

quote: The world is a book and those who do not travel read only one page.
author: St. Augustine

quote: To fall in love with God is the greatest romance; to seek him the greatest adventure; to find him, the greatest human achievement.
author: St. Augustine

quote: Lord, make me an instrument of your peace; where there is hatred, let me sow love.
author: St. Francis of Assisi

quote: Start by doing what's necessary; then do what's possible; and suddenly you are doing the impossible.
author: St. Francis of Assisi

quote: All the darkness in the world cannot extinguish the light of a single candle.
author: St. Francis of Assisi
